summary: Comprehensive testing of Luna Period Tracker app completed. Backend: 8/8 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All major features working correctly with one minor issue in AI insights auto-loading.

integration_issues.issue: AI insights do not auto-load when period is first started. The fetchInsight function is called but the insight text remains as placeholder 'Pull down to refresh for your daily insight'. Backend API works correctly (verified via direct API tests). Issue appears to be in the useEffect dependency chain or timing of state updates after period start.
integration_issues.workaround: Pull-to-refresh functionality exists but may not work in web preview (mobile-specific RefreshControl component)

issues: Console warnings: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated. Use 'boxShadow' instead (cosmetic, not breaking)
Package version warnings for @react-native-async-storage/async-storage and react-native-svg (not affecting functionality)

action_items: Investigate why AI insights don't auto-load on initial period start - check if EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL is properly accessible in component context
Consider adding error logging to fetchInsight function to debug silent failures
Optional: Update shadow* props to boxShadow to remove deprecation warnings
Optional: Update package versions for async-storage and react-native-svg to match Expo recommendations
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ All React Native components properly used (View, Text, TouchableOpacity, ScrollView, etc.)
✅ All interactive elements have testID attributes for testing
✅ StyleSheet.create() used consistently for all styles
✅ AsyncStorage properly implemented for local data persistence
✅ Environment variables used correctly (EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL in frontend, EMERGENT_LLM_KEY in backend)
✅ Backend API endpoints working correctly with proper error handling
✅ Proper separation of concerns (context, utils, components)
⚠️ Fixed: useEffect dependency array for fetchInsight was missing fetchInsight dependency (line 108-110 in index.tsx) - now includes [fetchInsight]
seed_data_creation: Test data created during frontend testing: 1 period logged, mood and symptom tracking data saved, PIN set to 1234
context_for_next_testing_agent: Luna Period Tracker app is fully functional. Backend APIs working perfectly. All frontend features (navigation, period tracking, calendar, history, settings, PIN lock) working correctly. One minor issue with AI insights not auto-loading on initial period start - backend API works but frontend useEffect may need additional debugging. App uses local storage only (AsyncStorage), no database. AI insights use real OpenAI GPT-4o-mini via Emergent LLM key.

home_screen.ai_insights_card: ⚠️ PARTIAL (card visible, API works, but auto-load not triggering)
